hero.description: Transforming ideas into robust and scalable digital solutions

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Professional Summary
about.description: Developer in training with practical experience in real projects delivered to clients such as Cesar School and Mesa Tech, including an award-winning project at Porto Digital. Currently pursuing a degree in Systems Analysis and Development at SENAC, I also have a degree in Accounting Sciences, which gives me a strategic advantage for positions in financial systems and ERPs. Knowledge in Java, Spring Boot, React, Node.js and TypeScript, with experience in agile methodologies and version control with Git.
about.objective: I am looking for an internship opportunity in Software Development, with the goal of applying and improving my knowledge.

jobs.description: Data entry and updating in systems/spreadsheets, information verification, document organization and administrative support, ensuring accuracy and meeting deadlines.

Website page updates and optimization with HTML and CSS, improving user experience and fixing visual inconsistencies. Technical support to customers with service and ticket resolution, as well as preventive and corrective maintenance of equipment. Commercial support in the sale of info products, including registration, delivery and after-sales support.

courses.description: Technological degree focused on software development, software engineering and IT project management.

courses.institution: Faculdade de Ciências Humanas de Olinda
courses.description: Accounting degree providing strategic vision for financial systems and ERPs.

items.name: Neuro - Appointment Manager
items.description: Web system for psychopedagogists to organize appointments, scheduling, reports and document storage per patient, replacing the use of spreadsheets and manual notebooks.

items.name: ANU – Employee Management
items.description: Platform for schedule management in companies with multiple simultaneous projects. Dashboard with workload monitoring, absence control and automatic alerts for expiring contracts and professionals on bench.

items.name: Bootcamp Santander: JAVA Back-end
items.description: Santander Bootcamp 2024 - Java Back-end (86 hours). Specialized in Java 21, Spring Boot 3, and RESTful APIs, with hands-on experience in data persistence (SQL/NoSQL), automated testing with JUnit/Mockito, and Agile methodologies.

items.name: Google: Inteligência Artificial e Produtividade
items.description: Santander | Google: AI and Productivity (2024). Developed practical skills in Generative AI and Prompt Engineering using Google Gemini to automate workflows, optimize professional tasks, and enhance daily productivity.

items.name: React essentials
items.description: React Fundamentals & HTTP. Mastered core React concepts, including Componentization, Hooks, and State Management. Focused on integrating front-end applications with HTTP routes and REST APIs to build dynamic and responsive web interfaces.
